'''Ummar''' was a stocky female [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] who was [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken's]] adjutant in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. She had [[Color/Legends|dark]] skin.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
